transcript: Speaker A (Human): मला I will to learn English. माझं I having interview tomorrow. [I want to learn English. I have an interview tomorrow.] Speaker B (AI): Do you want to learn English speaking? Speaker A (Human): Yes... पण तुम्ही मराठीत बोलू शकता का? [Yes... but can you speak in Marathi?] Speaker B (AI): नक्की. तुम्हाला इंग्रजी शिकायची आहे का? [Sure. Do you want to learn English?] Speaker A (Human): हो, पण माझ्याकडे फार वेळ आणि पैसे नाहीयेत. आणि मी मराठी मीडियममधून शिकलेय. [Yes, but I don't have much time and money. And I studied in Marathi medium.] Speaker B (AI): MySivi ट्राय करा. रोज फक्त १०-१५ मिनिटे माझ्यासोबत English practice करा. आणि एका महिन्यात तुम्ही चांगली English बोलायला लागाल. [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for just 10-15 minutes daily. And in one month, you will start speaking good English.] Speaker A (Human): पण तिथे teachers कोण असतील? [But who will be the teachers there?] Speaker B (AI): माझ्यासारखे AI teachers. Step-by-step English speaking शिकवतील. चुका लगेच correct करतील. आणि कधीही judge करणार नाहीत. [AI teachers like me. They will teach step-by-step English speaking, correct mistakes immediately, and never judge.] Speaker A (Human): Hmm... बरोबर वाटतंय. [Hmm... sounds right.] Speaker B (AI): MySivi app डाऊनलोड करा. ५० लाखांपेक्षा जास्त लोक रोज इथे English practice करतात. फक्त १ रुपयांच्या trial ने सुरुवात करा आणि तुमची English next level वर घेऊन जा. [Download MySivi app. More than 50 lakh people practice English here daily. Start with just a 1 rupee trial and take your English to the next level.] Speaker A (Human): Yes, मी लगेच MySivi app डाऊनलोड करते. [Yes, I will download MySivi app immediately.]
on_screen_text: मला I will to learn [I want to learn] English माझं [English my] I having interview [I having interview] Do you want to learn English Yes... पण तुम्ही [Yes... but you] मराठीत बोलू शकता [can speak in Marathi] नक्की [Sure] तुम्हाला इंग्रजी [you English] शिकायची आहे का [want to learn] हो पण माझ्याकडे [Yes but I have] फार वेळ आणि पैसे [much time and money] आणि मी मराठी [and I Marathi] मीडियममधून शिकलेय [studied in medium] MySivi ट्राय करा [Try MySivi] रोज फक्त 10-15 [Daily only 10-15] मिनिटे माझ्यासोबत [minutes with me] English practice आणि एका महिन्यात [and in one month] English बोलायला [to speak English] पण तिथे teacher [but teacher there] कोण असतील [who will be] माझ्यासारखे [like me] AI teachers Step-by-step English speaking चुका लगेच correct [mistakes immediately correct] आणि कधीही judge [and never judge] करणार नाहीत [will not do] Hmm... बरोबर वाटतंय [Hmm... sounds right] MySivi app 50 लाखांपेक्षा [More than 50 lakhs] जास्त लोक रोज [people daily] इथे English practice फक्त ₹1 च्या trial [only ₹1 trial] ने सुरुवात करा [start with] आणि तुमची English [and your English] next level Yes मी लगेच MySivi [I immediately MySivi] app डाऊनलोड करते [download app]
summary: A Marathi-speaking woman preparing for an interview learns about MySivi from an AI avatar. The app offers non-judgmental AI teachers who correct English mistakes in real-time. Viewers are prompted to download the app and start a 1-rupee trial.
